overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The camera moves along neon-lit sidewalks, crosses wet streets, circles a mysterious monument displaying 'FF:06:B5', and continues through plazas with holographic advertisements. High-quality game engine footage with atmospheric fog and ray-traced reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit sidewalk with shop fronts and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk past illuminated shop fronts and street lights

entered.detail: brightly lit storefronts with colorful neon signage reflecting on wet pavement
tall street lamp casting bright light through the rain and fog
tall palm trees lining the street visible through the mist
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising in the background
concrete and metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a rain-soaked sidewalk in a futuristic city. Neon-lit shop fronts line the left side while the street with palm trees and barriers is on the right. The atmosphere is foggy with heavy rain, and the street lights cast dramatic beams through the mist. No pedestrians are visible, and occasional vehicles pass on the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet intersection with digital signage and modern architecture

events.description: steps from sidewalk onto street crosswalk entering the open intersection
turns slightly toward the central monument plaza while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the rain-slicked street while approaching the monument plaza in the distance

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
modern glass building with illuminated 'Night City' signage
large holographic advertising screens displaying colorful graphics
approach to the large illuminated monument visible through the fog

segments.scene_description: The camera transitions from the enclosed sidewalk to a wide open intersection, crossing rain-slicked asphalt marked with crosswalk stripes. The 'Night City' building becomes prominent on the left with its teal signage, while digital billboards illuminate the scene. The camera turns toward a distant monument visible through the fog, with street lights and palm trees shifting to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: monument plaza with FF:06:B5 statue and circuit-patterned base

events.description: begins circling the monument base to view it from different angles
tilts camera upward to view the top of the towering statue against the foggy sky

agents.ego_description: circling the illuminated monument base and looking up at the FF:06:B5 holographic display

entered.detail: large dark statue with outstretched arms displaying glowing 'FF:06:B5' text
raised platform with glowing yellow circuit patterns and ground lights
floating digital display showing 'FF:06:B5' in bright yellow characters
recessed circular lights embedded in the plaza pavement

segments.scene_description: The camera arrives at the central monument plaza, circling a massive statue displaying the cryptic 'FF:06:B5' hologram. The monument sits on a raised platform with glowing yellow circuit patterns. The camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the statue against the foggy night sky, surrounded by the silhouettes of distant skyscrapers. The area is devoid of vehicles and pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with digital advertising pillars and billboards

events.description: exits monument plaza into commercial district with advertising pillars

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza past digital advertising pillars toward the street

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screens displaying advertisements
dark benches situated along the plaza walkway
cars parked along the edge of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Leaving the monument behind, the camera moves through a commercial plaza filled with tall digital advertising pillars and a prominent 'COLA' billboard. The ground remains wet with reflections of neon lights. The scene transitions toward a street with parked vehicles visible on the right, while modern glass towers surround the plaza on all sides.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rain-drenched urban sidewalk into a wide commercial plaza centered around a cryptic holographic monument. It begins by moving along a foggy, neon-lit sidewalk lined with shop fronts and palm trees, where dramatic beams of light pierce through heavy rain. As the camera leaves the enclosed walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection of rain-slicked asphalt, passing the teal signage of the Night City building before turning toward a distant structure shrouded in mist. The movement then leads into a central plaza to circle a massive statue displaying a glowing FF:06:B5 hologram on a yellow circuit-patterned platform, tilting upward to reveal the monument against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers. Finally, the camera moves away from the statue and through a commercial district filled with digital advertising pillars and a prominent COLA billboard, ending among modern glass towers and parked vehicles.
